Message Text: Provide the address line for the subject property physical address.
Rule Logic: If AddressLineText is not provided

Message Text: Provide the city name for the subject property physical address.
Rule Logic: If CityName is not provided

Message Text: Provide the county name for the subject property physical address.
Rule Logic: If CountyName is not provided

Message Text: Provide the ZIP code for the subject property physical address.
Rule Logic: If PostalCode is not provided

Message Text: The ZIP code for the subject property physical address must be either 5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits (ZIP+4).
Rule Logic: If PostalCode is not in the required format (5 digits, or 5 digits, a hyphen, and 4 digits)

Message Text: Provide the state code for the subject property physical address.
Rule Logic: If StateCode is not provided

Message Text: The state code for the subject property physical address must be a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code.
Rule Logic: If StateCode is not a valid 2-character US State or Territory Code

Message Text: Provide the latitude for subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If LatitudeIdentifier is not provided

Message Text: Provide the longitude for subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If LongitudeIdentifier is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of ADUs, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided

Message Text: The number of 'Accessory Dwelling Units' does not equal the number of living units identified as an ADU.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount <> the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"

Message Text: Provide the 'Attachment Type' for the property.
Rule Logic: If AttachmentType is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of dwellings.
Rule Logic: If DwellingCount is not provided

Message Text: The total number of dwellings must be at least 1.
Rule Logic: If DwellingCount < 1

Message Text: The total number of dwellings exceeds the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.
Rule Logic: If DwellingCount > LivingUnitExcludingADUCount

Message Text: The 'Dwellings Containing Units' does not equal the number of structures identified as a dwelling.
Rule Logic: If DwellingCount does not equal the number of instances of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

Message Text: Provide the total number of living units, excluding any ADUs.
Rule Logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount is not provided

Message Text: The total number of living units, excluding any ADUs, must be at least 1.
Rule Logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount < 1

Message Text: The 'Units Excluding ADUs' does not equal the number of living units delivered in the UAD XML.
Rule Logic: If LivingUnitExcludingADUCount does not equal the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "false"

Message Text: Provide 'Property Rights Appraised'.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and PropertyEstateType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Property Rights Appraised' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Other" and PropertyEstateTypeOtherDescription is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property is located within a PUD.
Rule Logic: If PUDIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Ground Rent Annual Amount'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseAnnualAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the property ground lease expiration date.
Rule Logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseExpirationDate is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property ground lease is renewable.
Rule Logic: If PropertyEstateType = "Leasehold" and LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false", and PropertyGroundLeaseRenewableIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has any special tax assessments.
Rule Logic: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether all ownership rights of the property are included as part of the valuation.
Rule Logic: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "false" and AllPropertyRightsAppraisedIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Deliver this indicator as false for each ownership right that is not included in the appraisal. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If AppraisedIndicator is not "false" in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST

Message Text: Provide 'Rights Not Included'.
Rule Logic: If AllPropertyRightsAppraisedIndicator = "false" and (at least one instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST is not provided or PropertyPartialInterestType is not provided in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Rights Not Included' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyPartialInterestType = "Other" and PropertyPartialInterestTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of REAL_PROPERTY_INTEREST

Message Text: The subject property has not been identified in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If an instance of PROPERTY is not provided with @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"

Message Text: More than one property has been identified as the subject property. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If more than one instance of PROPERTY has @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"

Message Text: Provide 'ValuationUseType' for each property included in the appraisal. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType is not provided for one or more instances of PROPERTY

Message Text: Provide 'Homeowner Responsible for all Exterior Maintenance of Dwelling(s)'.
Rule Logic: If HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator is not provided
Report Label / Value: Homeowner Responsible for all Exterior Maintenance of Dwelling(s)

Message Text: Indicate whether the site is owned in common.
Rule Logic: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Each ValuationAnalysisCategoryType can only be delivered once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is more than one instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with the same ValuationAnalysisCategoryType enumeration

Message Text: Provide ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = 'PropertySpecialTaxAssessments' when there are special tax assessments. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "PropertySpecialTaxAssessments"

Message Text: Provide 'Description of Special Tax Assessments and Impact to Value / Marketability'.
Rule Logic: If SpecialTaxAssessmentsIndicator = "true" and ValuationCommentText is not provided in the instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "PropertySpecialTaxAssessments"
Report Label / Value: Description of Special Tax Assessments and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether the property is located on Native American lands.
Rule Logic: If NativeAmericanLandsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of ADUs in the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property is located in a project.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the legal description or an image of the legal description.
Rule Logic: If ImageCategoryType = "LegalDescription" is not provided in any instance of IMAGE, and ParcelsLegalDescription is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the structure is a 'Dwelling' or 'Outbuilding'.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "RentalComparable" and ImprovementType is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has any amenities.
Rule Logic: If PropertyAmenityExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the subject property amenities have any defects, damages, or deficiencies.
Rule Logic: If PropertyAmenityExistsIndicator = "true" and SubjectPropertyAmenitiesDefectsExistIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the structure is a 'Dwelling' or 'Outbuilding'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: At least one structure on the property must be identified as a 'Dwelling'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType is not "Dwelling" in at least one instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the property is new construction.
Rule Logic: If NewConstructionIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Year Built' for each dwelling.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and PropertyStructureBuiltYear is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: The property can only be considered as new construction when 'Year Built' for the dwelling(s) is within 1 year of the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If NewConstructionIndicator = "true", and PropertyStructureBuiltYear is not the same year, or within 1 year of the AppraisalReportEffectiveDate, for one or more instances of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling".

Message Text: The 'Year Built' is prior to 1800. Please check for accuracy.
Rule Logic: If PropertyStructureBuiltYear < 1800 in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

Message Text: The 'Year Built' for a dwelling cannot be after 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If ((ExteriorConditionRatingCode = "C1" and PropertyStructureBuiltYear > year of (AppraisalReportEffectiveDate) + 2 years ) or (ExteriorConditionRatingCode <> "C1" and PropertyStructureBuiltYear > year of (AppraisalReportEffectiveDate)) in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

Message Text: For each dwelling indicate whether the 'Year Built' was estimated.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and PropertyStructureBuiltYearEstimatedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the structure has a permanent heating system.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true", and LivingUnitCount = 0, and HeatingSystemExistsIndicator is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the intended functional design for each outbuilding (e.g., barn, standalone ADU, pool house).
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Outbuilding Type' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If OutbuildingType = "Other" and OutbuildingTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: The type of utility(s) that exist in the outbuilding must be included. Select 'None' if there are no utilities.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true", and (at least one instance of OUTBUILDING_UTILITY is not provided or UtilityType is not provided in a given instance of OUTBUILDING_UTILITY)

Message Text: Provide a description when utility type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and UtilityType = "Other" and UtilityTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of OUTBUILDING_UTILITY

Message Text: Provide 'Structure Design' (e.g., Low-rise, Mid-rise, High-rise, Rowhouse / Townhouse, Semi-Detached) for each dwelling.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached", and StructuralDesignType is not provided in ARCHITECTURAL_DESIGN in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Structure Design' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If StructuralDesignType = "Other" and StructuralDesignTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ARCHITECTURAL_DESIGN

Message Text: Provide 'Construction Method' (e.g., Site Built, Manufactured, Modular) for each dwelling.
Rule Logic: If ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Detached") or (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = "RowhouseTownhouse" or "SemiDetached" or "Other")), and (at least one instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD is not provided or ConstructionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Construction Method' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ConstructionMethodType = "Other" and ConstructionMethodTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD

Message Text: Provide the estimated number of years of the dwelling's remaining useful life.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and EstimatedRemainingEconomicLifeYearsCount is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_ANALYSIS_DETAIL

Message Text: The exterior feature type must be included. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Feature Type' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Other" and ImprovementComponentTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the foundation details (e.g., style, material) for the structure.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL with ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation"

Message Text: Provide the materials used for the foundation.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation" and (at least one instance of FOUNDATION_MATERIAL is not provided or FoundationMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_MATERIAL)

Message Text: Provide a description when foundation material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If FoundationMaterialType = "Other" and FoundationMaterialTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_MATERIAL

Message Text: Provide the type of foundation.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "Foundation" and (at least one instance of FOUNDATION_STYLE is not provided or FoundationType is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_STYLE)

Message Text: Provide a description when foundation type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If FoundationType = "Other" and FoundationTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of FOUNDATION_STYLE

Message Text: Provide the roof details (e.g., estimated age, material) for the structure.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL with ImprovementComponentType = "Roof"

Message Text: Provide the estimated age of the roof.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Roof" and RoofEstimatedAgeRangeType is not provided in ROOF_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the roof is observable.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Roof" and RoofObservableIndicator is not provided in ROOF_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the roof material.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "Roof" and (at least one instance of ROOF_MATERIAL is not provided or RoofMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of ROOF_MATERIAL)

Message Text: Provide a description when roof material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If RoofMaterialType = "Other" and RoofMaterialTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ROOF_MATERIAL

Message Text: Provide additional description for the exterior feature being referenced.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true", and ImprovementComponentType = "Windows" or "Other", and ImprovementComponentTypeAdditionalDescription is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Condition Status'.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ImprovementComponentType <> "Roof"), or (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ImprovementComponentType = "Roof" and RoofObservableIndicator = "true"), and ImprovementComponentConditionStatusType is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the exterior walls and trim details (e.g., material) for the structure.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL with ImprovementComponentType = "'ExteriorWallsAndTrim"

Message Text: Provide the exterior wall material type.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" AND HomeownerResponsibleForExteriorMaintenanceIndicator = "true" and ImprovementComponentType = "ExteriorWallsAndTrim" and (at least one instance of EXTERIOR_WALL is not provided or WallMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of EXTERIOR_WALL)

Message Text: Provide a description when exterior wall material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If WallMaterialType = "Other" and WallMaterialTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of EXTERIOR_WALL

Message Text: Indicate whether the rowhouse / townhouse is an end unit.
Rule Logic: If StructuralDesignType = "RowhouseTownhouse" and RowhouseTownhouseEndUnitIndicator is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Gross Building Area' of the outbuilding.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true", and StructureAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the number of living units in the structure.
Rule Logic:
If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or 
(ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true"), and LivingUnitCount is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: The number of living units cannot be 0 for any dwelling.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and LivingUnitCount = 0 in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: The number of living units in the structure does not equal the number of units delivered in the UAD XML for the structure. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: For each IMPROVEMENT, if LivingUnitCount <> the number of instances of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: Provide the number of 'Floors in Building'.
Rule Logic: If StructuralDesignType = "Highrise" or "Midrise", and StoriesCount is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the factory-built certification has been examined for an on-frame modular or modular home.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and ConstructionMethodType = "Modular" or "OnFrameModular", and FactoryBuiltCertificationExaminedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the heating system type. Select 'None' if there is no heating system.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0), and (at least one instance of HEATING_SYSTEM is not provided or HeatingSystemType is not provided in a given instance of HEATING_SYSTEM)

Message Text: Provide a description when heating system type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If HeatingSystemType = "Other" and HeatingSystemTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of HEATING_SYSTEM

Message Text: When 'Units Excluding ADUs' is more than 1, the structure identifier must be provided for each dwelling.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1, and StructureIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: The structure identifier must be unique.
Rule Logic: If StructureIdentifier is not unique across all instances of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: The structure identifier must be unique.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and StructureIdentifier is not unique across all instances of IMPROVEMENT/STRUCTURE/STRUCTURE_DETAIL for a given comp
Report Subsection: Unit(s); Exterior Quality and Condition; Interior Quality and Condition

Message Text: Indicate whether the outbuilding has any defects, damages, or deficiencies.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and OutbuildingDefectsExistIndicator is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the finished area of the outbuilding, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and StructureExcludingVehicleStorageAndADUFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the unfinished area of the outbuilding, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and StructureExcludingVehicleStorageAndADUUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the dwelling has any non-continuous finished area (e.g., a finished office above, below, or behind an attached garage that cannot be accessed from within any living unit).
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and LivingUnitExcludingADUCount = 1, and NonContinuousFinishedAreaIndicator is not provided in in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the core heating system for dwelling is located below grade.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and HeatingSystemType <> "None", and CoreHeatingSystemBelowGradeIndicator is not provided in SYSTEM_DETAIL for a given instance of IMPROVEMENT

Message Text: Provide the approximate elevation range from grade level to the bottom of the front entrance door of the dwelling.
Rule Logic: If FrontDoorApproximateElevationRangeType is not provided in STRUCTURE_DETAIL for a given instance of IMRPOVEMENT with ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

Message Text: The manufactured home certification program name (e.g., Fannie Mae MH Advantage, Freddie Mac CHOICEHome) must be included when the manufactured home certification program identifier has been delivered.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityIdentifier is provided and ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityType is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_FINANCING_PROGRAM

Message Text: The manufactured home certification program identifier must be included when the manufactured home certification program name (e.g., Fannie Mae MH Advantage, Freddie Mac CHOICEHome) has been delivered.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityType is provided and ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_FINANCING_PROGRAM

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Manufactured Home Certification Program' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityType = "Other" and ManufacturedHomeFinancingProgramEligibilityTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_FINANCING_PROGRAM

Message Text: Indicate whether the manufactured home is attached to a permanent foundation.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome"), and ManufacturedHomeAttachedToFoundationIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the towing hitch, wheels and axles have been removed from the frame of the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0), and ManufacturedHomeHitchWheelsAxlesRemovedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the HUD certification label is present for each section of the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0), and ManufacturedHomeHUDCertificateLabelIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the HUD data plate is attached to the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0), and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the year (YYYY format) in which the manufactured home was installed.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured", and ManufacturedHomeInstalledDate is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the content of the manufacturer's or retailer's invoice appears reasonable.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured" and (ManufacturedHomeRetailerInvoiceReviewedIndicator = "true" or ManufacturedHomeInvoiceReviewedIndicator = "true") and ManufacturedHomeInvoiceReasonableIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the Appraiser has reviewed and analyzed the manufactured home manufacturer's invoice.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured", and NewConstructionIndicator = "true", and ManufacturedHomeInvoiceReviewedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the date the manufactured home was built as noted on the HUD data plate.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator = "true", and ManufacturedHomeManufactureDate is not provided

Message Text: The 'Date of Manufacture' is prior to 1976. Please check for accuracy.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeManufactureDate < 1976 in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether any modifications, attachments or additions (e.g., deck, porch, garage) have been made to the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0), and ManufacturedHomeModificationIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL
Report Label / Value: Have there been any modifications, attachments or additions that rely on or have altered the original structure for support?

Message Text: Indicate whether the manufactured home has been moved to a different location than the one on which it was originally installed.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured", and ManufacturedHomeMovedAfterOriginalInstallationIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the manufactured home was purchased from a retailer.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured", and NewConstructionIndicator = "true", and ManufacturedHomePurchasedFromRetailerIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the Appraiser has reviewed and analyzed the manufactured home retailer's invoice.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured", and ManufacturedHomePurchasedFromRetailerIndicator = "true", and ManufacturedHomeRetailerInvoiceReviewedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'HUD Roof Load Zone'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator = "true", and RoofLoadZoneCode is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether skirting exists for the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling", and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured", and SkirtingExistsIndicator is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'HUD Thermal Zone'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator = "true", and ThermalZoneCode is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'HUD Wind Zone'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethod = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator = "true", and WindZoneCode is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the type of attachment, modification or addition (e.g., deck, porch, garage) made to the manufactured home.
Rule Logic:
If ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeModificationIndicator = "true") 
or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingType = "ManufacturedHome" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and LivingUnitCount > 0 and ManufacturedHomeModificationIndicator = "true")) and (at least one instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_MODIFICATION is not provided or ManufacturedHomeModificationType is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_MODIFICATION)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Modification, Attachment, or Addition' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeModificationType = "Other" and ManufacturedHomeModificationTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of MANUFACTURED_HOME_MODIFICATION

Message Text: Provide the skirting material type for the manufactured home.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured" and SkirtingExistsIndicator = "true", and (at least one instance of SKIRTING_MATERIAL is not provided or SkirtingMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of SKIRTING_MATERIAL)

Message Text: Provide a description when skirting material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If SkirtingMaterialType = "Other" and SkirtingMaterialTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of SKIRTING_MATERIAL

Message Text: Indicate whether the manufactured home installed date was estimated.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeInstalledDateEstimatedIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Manufactured Home Width' (i.e., Single Wide, Multi Wide).
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeWidthType is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the total amount of sales concessions is known.
Rule Logic: If SalesConcessionIndicator = "true" and SalesConcessionAmountKnownIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate the presence of sales concessions in the sales contract.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractReviewedIndicator = "true" and SalesConcessionIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Contract Price'.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractReviewedIndicator = "true" and SalesContractAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the date the sales contract was fully executed.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractReviewedIndicator = "true" and SalesContractDate is not provided

Message Text: The 'Contract Date' cannot be after the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractDate > AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

Message Text: Indicate whether the Appraiser has reviewed and analyzed the sales contract.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractExistsIndicator = "true" and SalesContractReviewedIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Total Sales Concessions' amount.
Rule Logic: If SalesConcessionAmountKnownIndicator = "true" and TotalSalesConcessionAmount is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether there is a sales contract associated with the property.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Transfer Terms'.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractReviewedIndicator = "true" and SaleType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Transfer Terms' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If SaleType = "Other" and SaleTypeOtherDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide the type of accessibility feature. Select 'None' if there are no accessibility features.
Rule Logic:
If ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" ) or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and
If (at least one instance of ACCESSIBILITY_FEATURE is not provided or AccessibilityFeatureType is not provided in a given instance of ACCESSIBILITY_FEATURE)
Report Subsection: Accessibility Features for Individuals with Disabilities

Message Text: Provide the primary exterior access method (e.g., walk-out, walk-up) for the below grade area.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and (AccessType = "ExteriorAccessOnly" or "InteriorAndExteriorAccess")) or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and (AccessType = "ExteriorAccessOnly" or "InteriorAndExteriorAccess")), and BelowGradeExteriorAccessType is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Grade Level' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If BelowGradeExteriorAccessType = "Other" and BelowGradeExteriorAccessTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL

Message Text: Provide the Grade Level Type (i.e., Above Grade, Fully Below Grade, Partially Below Grade) for the level.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and GradeLevelType is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL

Message Text: Provide the level type (e.g., Level 1, Level 2, Level B1).
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and (at least one instance of LEVEL is not provided or LevelType is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL)

Message Text: Provide at least one instance of 'Kitchen' for each living unit.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and (at least one instance of ROOM_DETAIL with RoomType = "Kitchen" is not provided)

Message Text: Provide a description when room type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If RoomType = "Other" and RoomTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ROOM_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Condition Status' for the room.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true") and (RoomType = "FullBathroom" or "HalfBathroom" or "Kitchen"), and RoomConditionStatusType is not provided in a given instance of ROOM_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Update Status' for the room.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")) and RoomType = ("FullBathroom" or "HalfBathroom" or "Kitchen"), and RoomUpdateStatusType is not provided in a given instance of ROOM_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the timeframe in which the room was updated.
Rule Logic: If RoomType = "FullBathroom" or "HalfBathroom" or "Kitchen", and RoomUpdateStatusType = "FullyUpdated" or "PartiallyUpdated", and RoomUpdatedTimeframeType is not provided in a given instance of ROOM_DETAIL

Message Text: The interior feature type must be included.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and ImprovementComponentType is not provided in a given instance of INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the flooring details (e.g., material, condition) for the living unit.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and ImprovementComponentType = "Flooring" is not provided in INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL for a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: Provide the flooring material(s).
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Flooring" and (at least one instance of FLOOR_COVERING is not provided or FlooringType is not provided in a given instance of FLOOR_COVERING)

Message Text: Provide a description when flooring material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If FlooringType = "Other" and FlooringTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of FLOOR_COVERING

Message Text: Provide the walls and ceiling details (e.g., style, height) for the living unit.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and ImprovementComponentType = "WallsAndCeiling" is not provided in INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Feature Type' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Other" and ImprovementComponentTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the approximate ceiling height(s) for the living unit.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "WallsAndCeiling" and (at least one instance of CEILING_HEIGHT is not provided or ApproximateCeilingHeightType is not provided in a given instance of CEILING_HEIGHT)

Message Text: Provide additional description for the interior feature being referenced.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Other" and ImprovementComponentTypeAdditionalDescription is not provided in a given instance of INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Condition Status'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "WallsAndCeiling" or "Other", and ImprovementComponentConditionStatusType is not provided in a given instance of INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the subject property is a corner unit.
Rule Logic: If StructuralDesignType = "Lowrise" or "Highrise" or "Midrise", and CornerUnitIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Floor Number'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = ("Lowrise" or "Highrise" or "Midrise"), and FloorIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit is included in the rent schedule.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and RentScheduleIndicator = "true") or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and RentScheduleIndicator = "true") , and UnitIncludedInRentScheduleIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the interior condition rating.
Rule Logic:
If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") 
or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and InteriorConditionRatingCode is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the interior quality rating.
Rule Logic:
If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling") 
OR (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and InteriorQualityRatingCode is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit utilities are metered separately.
Rule Logic: If (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0), and UtilitiesMeteredSeparatelyIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether ADUs are typical to the market.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitTypicalToMarketIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit is an ADU.
Rule Logic: if AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL when STRUCTURE_DETAIL/LivingUnitCount > 0

Message Text: Indicate whether the ADU has a separate postal address.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and SeparatePostalAddressIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide ingress/egress to the ADU (i.e., Interior Access Only, Exterior Access Only, Interior and Exterior Access).
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and AccessType is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the ADU is legally rentable.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitLegallyRentableIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit has any Live/Work space.
Rule Logic: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "true" and AllowableLiveWorkSpaceIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Condition Status' for each floor covering.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Flooring" and ImprovementComponentConditionStatusType is not provided in FLOOR_COVERING in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: Unit Identifier must be provided when multiple living units are identified in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If (LivingUnitExcludingADUCount > 1 or AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount > 0), and UnitIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: The unit identifier must be unique.
Rule Logic: If UnitIdentifier is not unique across all instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: The unit identifier must be unique.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and UnitIdentifier is not unique across all instances of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Overall Update Status for Bathrooms'.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and OverallBathroomsUpdateStatusType is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the number of bedrooms in the living unit, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true"), and BedroomCount is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the number of full bathrooms in the living unit, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and FullBathroomCount is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the number of half bathrooms in the living unit, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and HalfBathroomCount is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the level type (e.g., Level 1, Level 2, Level B1).
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and LevelType is not provided in a given instance ROOM_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Overall Update Status for Flooring'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementComponentType = "Flooring" and OverallFlooringUpdateStatusType is not provided in a given instance of INTERIOR_COMPONENT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide at least one data source reference for the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If at least one DataSourceType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when data source type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If DataSourceType = "Other" and DataSourceTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of DATA_SOURCE

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit has any non-residential uses.
Rule Logic: If LandOwnedInCommonIndicator = "true" and UnitMixedUsageIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide at least one data source for each living unit associated with the subject property. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA" that links DATA_SOURCE to each PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA where @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"

Message Text: Provide the finished area of each level in the living unit.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and LevelFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL

Message Text: Provide the unfinished area of each level in the living unit.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and LevelUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of LEVEL

Message Text: Provide the 'Finished Above Grade' Area, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitStandardAboveGradeFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Finished Above Grade (Nonstandard)' Area, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitNonStandardAboveGradeFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Unfinished Above Grade' Area, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitAboveGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Finished Below Grade' Area, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitStandardBelowGradeFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Unfinished Below Grade' Area, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitBelowGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Indicate whether the subject property has a prior sale or transfer.
Rule Logic: If PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the ownership transfer transaction type (i.e., sale, deed transfer only).
Rule Logic: If PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true" and (at least one instance of SALES_HISTORY is not provided or OwnershipTransferTransactionType is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY)

Message Text: Provide the 'Transfer Terms'.
Rule Logic: If PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true" and OwnershipTransferTransactionType = "Sale", and SaleType is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Transfer Terms' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If SaleType = "Other" and SaleTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide the ownership transfer date.
Rule Logic: IF PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true" and OwnershipTransferDate is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: The prior sale or transfer date for the subject property must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If OwnershipTransferDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format) in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: The amount related to the transfer of ownership of real property (typically the sale price) must be greater than or equal to $0.
Rule Logic: If OwnershipTransferTransactionAmount < 0 in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Ownership Transfer Amount Not Available Reason Type' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If OwnershipTransferAmountNotAvailableReasonType = "Other" and OwnershipTransferAmountNotAvailableReasonTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the sales comparable does not have any prior sales or transfer history. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "false", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator" that links DATA_SOURCE to PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the subject property does not have any prior sales or transfer history. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "false", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator" that links DATA_SOURCE to PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the sales comparable has a prior sale or transfer history. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to SALES_HISTORY for each prior sale or transfer. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_SALES_HISTORY" that links DATA_SOURCE to SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the subject property has a prior sale or transfer history. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to SALES_HISTORY for each prior sale or transfer. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_SALES_HISTORY" that links DATA_SOURCE to SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has been listed within the previous twelve (12) months.
Rule Logic: If ListedWithinPreviousYearIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of days the property has been on the market.
Rule Logic: If ListedWithinPreviousYearIndicator = "true" and DaysOnMarketCount is not provided in a given instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Current or Final List Price'.
Rule Logic: If ListedWithinPreviousYearIndicator = "true" and FinalListPriceAmount is not provided in a given instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL

Message Text: The listing start date cannot be after the listing end date.
Rule Logic: If ListingStartDate > ListingEndDate in a given instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Listing Status'.
Rule Logic: If ListedWithinPreviousYearIndicator = "true" and ( at least one instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL is not provided or ListingStatusType is not provided in a given instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Listing Type' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ListingType = "Other" and ListingTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of LISTING_INFORMATION_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the subject property is not listed within the previous year. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to LISTING_INFORMATION_SUMMARY. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and ListedWithinPreviousYearIndicator = "false", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_LISTING_INFORMATION_SUMMARY" that links DATA_SOURCE to LISTING_INFORMATION_SUMMARY

Message Text: Indicate whether the cost approach valuation method has been utilized.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the appraisal has been prepared for a government agency.
Rule Logic: If GovernmentAgencyAppraisalIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the federal agency (i.e., VA, USDA, FHA) for which the appraisal has been prepared.
Rule Logic: If GovernmentAgencyAppraisalIndicator = "true" and GovernmentAgencyAppraisalType is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the income approach valuation method has been utilized.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Income approach is included in the appraisal, however no GRM comparables have been provided.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator = "true" and there are no instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable"

Message Text: When 'Income Approach Developed by Appraiser' is Yes, 'Rent Schedule Developed by Appraiser' must also be Yes.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator is "true" and RentScheduleIndicator is "false"

Message Text: Indicate whether the rent schedule was included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If RentScheduleIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Rent Schedule is included in the appraisal, however, no rental comparables have been provided.
Rule Logic: If RentScheduleIndicator = "true" and there are no instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "RentalComparable"

Message Text: Indicate whether the sales comparison approach valuation method has been utilized.
Rule Logic: If SalesComparisonApproachIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Assignment Reason'.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAssignmentType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Assignment Reason' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAssignmentType = "Other" and ValuationAssignmentTypeOtherDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide the date the property inspection was performed.
Rule Logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and InspectionDate is not provided in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

Message Text: Provide the 'Property Valuation Method'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyValuationMethodType is not provided

Message Text: 'ServiceType' = 'Valuation' must be delivered once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance or more than one instance of SERVICE_DETAIL with ServiceType = "Valuation"

Message Text: 'ServiceType' = 'Inspection' must be delivered no more than once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is more than one instance of SERVICE_DETAIL with ServiceType = "Inspection"

Message Text: A numeric identifier ('Comparable #') must be assigned for each land comparable. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "LandComparable" and PropertyOrdinalNumber is not provided

Message Text: Comparable # must be unique. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If PropertyOrdinalNumber is not unique across all instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "LandComparable"

Message Text: The 'Depreciated Cost of Dwellings' must be provided.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciatedCostDwellingsTotalAmount is not provided

Message Text: The 'Depreciated Cost of Outbuildings' must be provided.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciatedCostOutbuildingsTotalAmount is not provided when there are one or more instances of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true"

Message Text: Provide the 'Opinion of Site Value'.
Rule Logic:
If CostApproachIndicator = "true", or 
(CostApproachIndicator = "false" and SiteValueIndicator = "true") and SiteEstimatedValueAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'As Is Value of Site Improvements'.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and SiteOtherImprovementsAsIsAmount is not provided
Report Label / Value: As Is Value of Site Improvements

Message Text: Provide the 'Primary Site Valuation Method'.
Rule Logic:
If CostApproachIndicator = "true", or 
(CostApproachIndicator = "false" and SiteValueIndicator = "true") and SiteValuationMethodType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Primary Site Valuation Method' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If SiteValuationMethodType = "Other" and SiteValuationMethodTypeOtherDescription is not provided

Message Text: The 'Total Depreciation' displays as a negative number on the appraisal. However, it must be delivered as a positive number in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciationTotalAmount < 0 in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: The 'External Depreciation' displays as a negative number on the appraisal. However, it must be delivered as a positive number in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciationExternalAmount < 0 in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: The 'Functional Depreciation' displays as a negative number on the appraisal. However, it must be delivered as a positive number in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciationFunctionalAmount < 0 in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: The 'Physical Depreciation' displays as a negative number on the appraisal. However, it must be delivered as a positive number in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciationPhysicalAmount < 0 in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: Provide depreciation amount as summary, represented by 'Total Depreciation' or break out the three forms of depreciation ('Physical Depreciation', 'Functional Depreciation' and 'External Depreciation'), but not both.
Rule Logic: If DepreciationTotalAmount is provided, and (any of DepreciationExternalAmount, DepreciationFunctionalAmount, and DepreciationPhysicalAmount are also provided) in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: Primary Site Valuation Method' is provided as 'Sales Comparison', however, no land comparables have been provided.
Rule Logic: If SiteValuationMethodType = "SalesComparison" and there are no instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "LandComparable"

Message Text: Provide the 'Effective Date' for the Cost Data Source.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true", and (DataSourceType = "BuilderOrDeveloper" or "CostService" or "CostSurvey" or "Other"), and DataSourceEffectiveDate is not provided in the instance of DATA_SOURCE that is related to cost approach

Message Text: Provide the cost data provider name (e.g., Craftsman Cost Guide, Marshall and Swift).
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true", and DataSourceType = "CostService", and DataSourceName is not provided in a given instance of DATA_SOURCE

Message Text: Provide the cost service quality rating (e.g., excellent, very good) determined for the property.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DataSourceQualityRatingCode is not provided in the instance of DATA_SOURCE with DataSourceType = "CostService"

Message Text: Provide the 'Gross Rent Multiplier'.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator = "true" and GrossRentMultiplierFactorNumber is not provided

Message Text: Provide the value of the subject property as determined by the Income Approach method of property valuation.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator = "true" and ValueIndicatedByIncomeApproachAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Comparable Weight' for the GRM comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and ComparableWeightType is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Gross Rent Multiplier'.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and GrossMonthlyRentMultiplierNumber is not provided

Message Text: A numeric identifier ('Comparable #') must be assigned for each GRM comparable. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and PropertyOrdinalNumber is not provided

Message Text: Comparable # must be unique. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: if PropertyOrdinalNumber is not unique across all instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable"

Message Text: The total number of living units, excluding any ADUs, must be at least 1.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and LivingUnitExcludingADUCount < 1

Message Text: Provide 'Gross Monthly Rent'.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and TotalMonthlyActualRentAmount is not provided

Message Text: One or more additional row labels are not identical for one or more properties. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: For each combination of ComparableAdjustmentType = "GrossRentMultiplierAdditionalNonAdjustableComparisonItem" and AdditionalComparisonLineItemIdentifier, if there are not matching occurrences of COMPARABLE_ADJUSTMENT across all instances of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable", and the instance of PROPERTY with @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty". See UAD1455 for an example of this concept.

Message Text: Provide the 'Sale Price' for the GRM comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and OwnershipTransferTransactionType = "Sale" and OwnershipTransferTransactionAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the value of the subject property as determined by the Cost Approach method of property valuation.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and ValueIndicatedByCostApproachAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the value of the subject property as determined by the Sales Comparison Approach method of property valuation.
Rule Logic: If SalesComparisonApproachIndicator = "true" and ValueIndicatedBySalesComparisonAmount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the type of market value condition.
Rule Logic: If at least one instance of VALUATION_CONDITION is not provided or PropertyValuationConditionalConclusionType is not provided in a given instance of VALUATION_CONDITION

Message Text: When the appraisal is made 'As Is', no other type of market value condition can be delivered.
Rule Logic: If PropertyValuationConditionalConclusionType = "AsIs" and there are one or more additional instances of VALUATION_CONDITION

Message Text: Provide the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is not provided

Message Text: The 'Effective Date of Appraisal' cannot be a future date.
Rule Logic: If AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is in the future

Message Text: The 'Effective Date of Appraisal' cannot be more than a year old.
Rule Logic: If AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is more than 367 days before the current date

Message Text: The 'Effective Date of Appraisal' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If AppraisalReportEffectiveDate does not include year, month and day in YYYY-MM-DD format

Message Text: Provide MarketingOrExposureTimeType as 'ReasonableExposureTime'. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If MarketingOrExposureTimeType is not provided or is not = 'ReasonableExposureTime' in VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_SUMMARY_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide 'Opinion Of Market Value'.
Rule Logic: If OpinionOfValueAmount is not provided

Message Text: 'Opinion Of Market Value' must be at least one dollar, and cannot be negative.
Rule Logic: If OpinionOfValueAmount < 1

Message Text: 'Opinion Of Market Value' must be less than a billion dollars.
Rule Logic: If OpinionOfValueAmount > 1,000,000,000

Message Text: Indicate whether the client has requested additional value conditions.
Rule Logic: If AdditionalClientRequestedConditionsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide commentary for the reconciliation of market value.
Rule Logic: If ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'As Is Overall Condition Rating' for the subject property.
Rule Logic: If NewConstructionIndicator = "false" and (PropertyValuationConditionalConclusionType = "SubjectToCompletionPerPlans" or "SubjectToRepair") and PropertyAsIsConditionRatingCode is not provided

Message Text: The exterior inspection method, interior inspection method, and inspection date must be delivered no more than once for each Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser. In the UAD XML, only one instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL must be included for each Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" or "AppraiserSupervisor" and (no instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL is provided for each role or more than one instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL is provided for each role)

Message Text: Provide the location and file name of the appraisal (e.g., \\SF1Appraisal_v1.pdf). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ObjectURL is not provided in FOREIGN_OBJECT

Message Text: The MIMETypeIdentifier for the appraisal must be included as 'application/pdf' in the UAD XML. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If MIMETypeIdentifier in FOREIGN_OBJECT is not provided or not provided as "application/pdf"

Message Text: Provide the MISMO Reference Model version. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @MISMOReferenceModelIdentifier is not provided

Message Text: The required subject property photos must be included.
Rule Logic: If instances of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = DwellingFront, PropertyAccess, and PropertyPhoto are not provided

Message Text: Provide a photo of each sales comparable used in the valuation.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "PropertyPhoto"

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g.,\\Images\SF1_Comp2.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide a photo of the water frontage.
Rule Logic: If PrivateAccessIndicator = "true" for any instance of BODY_OF_WATER where the SiteInfluenceType = "BodyOfWater" and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "WaterFrontage"

Message Text: The mandatory room photos (i.e., kitchen, full-bathroom, half-bathroom) must be included.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of IMAGE in a given instance of ROOM with RoomType = "Kitchen" or "HalfBathroom" or "FullBathroom"

Message Text: Provide a photo of each GRM comparable used in the valuation.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "PropertyPhoto"

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g.,\\Images\SF1_Comp2.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the format of the image file. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType="GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and MIMETypeIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the sales comparable map.
Rule Logic: If SalesComparisonApproachIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "SalesComparableMap" in @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"

Message Text: Provide an image of the manufactured home HUD certification label.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and ManufacturedHomeHUDCertificateLabelIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "ManufacturedHomeHUDCertificationLabel"

Message Text: Provide an image of the manufactured home HUD data plate.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlateAttachedIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of IMAGE with ImageCategoryType = "ManufacturedHomeHUDDataPlate"

Message Text: Provide the type of property restriction.

Message Text: Provide a description when property restriction = 'Other'.

Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the easement type.

Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the direction of the encroachment (i.e., bordering property encroaching on subject property, subject property encroaching on bordering property).

Message Text: Provide the encroachment type.

Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide a description when encroachment = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If EncroachmentType = "Other" and EncroachmentTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ENCROACHMENT
Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the type of apparent environmental condition. Select 'None' if there are no apparent environmental conditions.

Message Text: Provide a description when apparent environmental condition = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If EnvironmentalConditionType = "Other" and EnvironmentalConditionTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ENVIRONMENTAL_CONDITION

Message Text: Provide the 'Elements Dividing Parcels'.
Rule Logic: If ParcelsContiguousIndicator = "false" and (at least one instance of NON_CONTIGUOUS_PARCEL_SEPARATOR is not provided or ParcelSeparatorType is not provided in a given instance of NON_CONTIGUOUS_PARCEL_SEPARATOR)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Elements Dividing Parcels' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ParcelSeparatorType = "Other" and ParcelSeparatorTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of NON_CONTIGUOUS_PARCEL_SEPARATOR

Message Text: Provide the size of each parcel.

Message Text: Provide the 'APN Description'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and (PARCEL_DETAIL is not provided or ParcelDescriptionClassificationType is not provided in a given instance of PARCEL)

Rule Logic: If ParcelDescriptionClassificationType = "Other" and ParcelDescriptionClassificationTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of PARCEL_DETAIL

Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium"), and at least one instance of PARCEL container with ParcelIdentificationType = "AssessorUnformattedIdentifier" is not provided or a given instance of PARCEL container does not include ParcelIdentificationType = "AssessorUnformattedIdentifier"

Message Text: Provide the 'Assessor Parcel Number (APN)'.
Rule Logic: If ParcelIdentificationType = "AssessorUnformattedIdentifier" and ParcelIdentifier is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the subject property is located in a community land trust.

Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Permanent Waterfront Feature' = 'Other'.
