Rule Logic: If PropertyValuationMethodType = "HybridAppraisal" and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "NoPhysicalInspection"

Message Text: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser", and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "InteriorAndExterior"

Message Text: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"), and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "NoPhysicalInspection"

Message Text: The Appraiser Certification (#10) does not align with the appraiser subject property inspection.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Virtual" or "NoInspection" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"), and ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType <> "Exterior"

Message Text: Indicate whether a third-party property data report was used.
Rule Logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator is not provided
Report Label / Value: Was a Property Data Report used in lieu of an Inspection?

Message Text: When a property data report was used, provide details on the individual providing property data collection.
Rule Logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of ROLE_DETAIL with PartyRoleType = "PropertyDataCollector" in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

Message Text: Provide the manner in which the Property Data Collector conducted the exterior inspection.
Rule Logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

Message Text: Provide the manner in which the Property Data Collector conducted the interior inspection.
Rule Logic: If PropertyDataReportIndicator = "true" and PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in SERVICE container with ServiceType = "Inspection"

Message Text: Indicate whether additional scope of work (beyond the minimum scope) has been identified for this valuation assignment.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAdditionalScopeOfWorkIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's first name.
Rule Logic: If FirstName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's last name.
Rule Logic: If LastName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's state-level credentials.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: Provide a description when the license type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType = "Other" and AppraiserLicenseTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of APPRAISER_LICENSE

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's license expiration date.
Rule Logic: If LicenseExpirationDate is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: The Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser license expired before the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If LicenseExpirationDate for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" and/or "AppraiserSupervisor" < AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

Message Text: The license expiration date must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If LicenseExpirationDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's license number.
Rule Logic: If LicenseIdentifier is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: Provide the Supervisory Appraiser's license issuing state.
Rule Logic: If LicenseIssuingAuthorityStateCode is not provided for PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: The Appraiser and Supervisory Appraiser must be licensed in the state in which the subject property is located.
Rule Logic: If LicenseIssuingAuthorityStateCode for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" or "AppraiserSupervisor" <> StateCode (PROPERTY/ADDRESS with @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty")

Message Text: A party role type of 'Supervisory Appraiser' must be provided.
Rule Logic: If (PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" and (AppraiserLicenseType = "None" or AppraiserLicenseType = "TraineeAppraiser")) and there is no instance of PARTY with PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor"

Message Text: The 'Date of Signature and Report' must be provided for the Appraiser and the Supervisory Appraiser (if applicable), with only one instance allowed per party.
Rule Logic: If ExecutionDate is not provided for PartyRoleType = ("AppraiserSupervisor" or "Appraiser") or more than one instance of ExecutionDate is provided for PartyRoleType = ("AppraiserSupervisor" or "Appraiser")

Message Text: The 'Date of Signature and Report' must be on or after the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If ExecutionDate < AppraisalReportEffectiveDate in a given instance of SIGNATORY

Message Text: Provide the address line for the Client company address.
Rule Logic: If AddressLineText is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

Message Text: Provide the city name for the Client company address.
Rule Logic: If CityName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

Message Text: Provide the ZIP code for the Client company address.
Rule Logic: If PostalCode is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

Message Text: Provide the state code for the Client company address.
Rule Logic: If StateCode is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

Message Text: Provide the name of the Client.
Rule Logic: If FullName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Client"

Message Text: A party role type of 'Client' must be provided.
Rule Logic: If no instances of PARTY with PartyRoleType = "Client" are provided

Message Text: Provide a description (e.g., Lender, AMC) for the client.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "Client" and there is not a second instance of ROLE_DETAIL in the Client instance of PARTY with PartyRoleType = "Attorney" or "Investor" or "Lender" or "ManagementCompany" or "Other"

Message Text: Provide the Appraiser's first name.
Rule Logic: If FirstName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: Provide the Appraiser's last name.
Rule Logic: If LastName is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: Provide the Appraiser's state-level credentials.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: Provide the Appraiser's license expiration date.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType <> "None" and LicenseExpirationDate is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: Provide the Appraiser's license number.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType <> "None" and LicenseIdentifier is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: Provide the state issuing the Appraiser's license.
Rule Logic: If AppraiserLicenseType <> "None" and LicenseIssuingAuthorityStateCode is not provided for PartyRoleType = "Appraiser"

Message Text: A party role type of 'Appraiser' must be provided.
Rule Logic: If no instances of PARTY with PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" are provided

Message Text: Provide a description when party role type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "Other" and PartyRoleTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ROLE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the date the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser inspected the subject property.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), or (PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType = "Physical" or "Virtual"), and InspectionDate is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

Message Text: The 'Inspection Date' must be on or before the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If InspectionDate > AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

Message Text: Provide the manner in which the exterior inspection was conducted by the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser.
Rule Logic: If PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the manner in which the interior inspection was conducted by the Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of INSPECTION_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Company Name' for the Lender or AMC.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "Lender" or "ManagementCompany" and FullName is not provided

Message Text: Provide the first name of the person that has provided significant real property appraisal assistance.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "SignificantRealPropertyAppraisalAssistance" and FirstName is not provided
Report Label / Value: Significant Real Property Appraisal Assistance - Name

Message Text: Provide the last name of the person that has provided significant real property appraisal assistance.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "SignificantRealPropertyAppraisalAssistance" and LastName is not provided
Report Label / Value: Significant Real Property Appraisal Assistance - Name

Message Text: Provide description of the significant real property appraisal assistance provided.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "SignificantRealPropertyAppraisalAssistance" and PartyRoleTypeAdditionalDescription is not provided
Report Label / Value: Significant Real Property Appraisal Assistance - Description

Message Text: Provide the ownership rights for the amenity.
Rule Logic: If AmenityType = "BoatSlip" or "UnitStorage", and AmenityOwnershipType is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_AMENITY

Message Text: Provide a description when amenity ownership type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If AmenityOwnershipType = "Other" and AmenityOwnershipTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_AMENITY

Message Text: Provide amenities in the project. Select 'None' if there are no amenities.
Rule Logic: If (PUDIndicator = "true" or PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true"), and (at least one instance of PROJECT_AMENITY is not provided or AmenityType is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_AMENITY)

Message Text: Provide a description when amenity type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If AmenityType = "Other" and AmenityTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_AMENITY

Message Text: The AssociationChargeType must be provided as 'AssociationDues' for the mandatory association fees. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: IF PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE with AssociationChargeType = "AssociationDues"

Message Text: Provide the mandatory monthly fee amount, even if the amount is 0.
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeType = "AssociationDues" and AssociationChargeAmount is not provided in the given instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE

Message Text: The association charge period must be provided as monthly. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeType = "AssociationDues", and AssociationChargePeriodType is either not provided, or not = "Monthly" in the given instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE

Message Text: Provide the type of the common utility / service that is included in the association charges.
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeType = "AssociationDues" and (at least one instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE_INCLUDES_UTILITY is not provided or AssociationChargeIncludesUtilityType is not provided in the given instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE_INCLUDES_UTILITY)

Message Text: Provide a description when the type of the utility / service included in the association charges = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeIncludesUtilityType = "Other" and AssociationChargeIncludesUtilityTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE_INCLUDES_UTILITY

Message Text: The AssociationChargeType must be provided as 'AssociationSpecialAssessment' for the project special assessments. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE with AssociationChargeType = "AssociationSpecialAssessment"

Message Text: Provide the existing special assessment balance attributed to the subject property.
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeType = "AssociationSpecialAssessment" and AssociationSpecialAssessmentStatusType = "Existing", and AssociationChargeBalanceAmount is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether transferring ownership incurs a fee with the association.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and OwnershipTransferFeeIndicator is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the cooperative proprietary lease expiration date.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Cooperative" or "Condop", and CooperativeProprietaryLeaseExpirationDate is not provided

Message Text: Provide the number of 'Shares Attributable to Subject Property'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Cooperative" or "Condop", and PropertyCooperativeSharesCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Pro Rata Share' for the subject property.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true" and ProRataSharePercent is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the project is subject to ground rent.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectAnalysisGroundRentIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description of the deficiencies observed in the project.
Rule Logic: If ProjectDeficiencyObservedIndicator = "true" and ProjectConditionAndQualityDescription is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether any deficiencies that impact value / marketability have been observed in the project.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectDeficiencyObservedIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether a final balloon payment is required to fully pay off the loan.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true" and BalloonIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_BLANKET_FINANCING

Message Text: Provide the remaining maturity term for each lien of the project blanket financing.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true" and LoanRemainingMaturityTermMonthsCount is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_BLANKET_FINANCING

Message Text: Provide the 'Pro Rata Share of Balance Attributable to Unit'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true", and LineOfCreditIndicator = "false", and UPBProRataShareAttributableToUnitAmount is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_BLANKET_FINANCING
Report Label / Value: Pro Rata Share of Balance Attributable to Unit

Message Text: Provide the 'Unpaid Principal Balance'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true", and LineOfCreditIndicator = "false", and UPBAmount is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_BLANKET_FINANCING

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has been converted from its prior use.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectConversionIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the original use of the project.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectConversionIndicator = "true"), and ProjectConversionOriginalUseType is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide a description when the project's original use = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectConversionOriginalUseType = "Other" and ProjectConversionOriginalUseTypeOtherDescription is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether the research on the project revealed pending or current legal actions.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true") and LegalActionIndicator is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether the project contains commercial space.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectCommercialSpaceIndicator is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the overall percentage of commercial space in the project in which the subject property is located.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true", and ProjectCommercialSpaceIndicator = "true", and ProjectCommercialSpacePercent is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether the construction of the units, common elements and amenities in the project are complete.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectCompletedIndicator is not provided
Report Label / Value: Are units, common areas, and amenities in project complete?

Message Text: Provide the total number of units in the project.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectDwellingUnitCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of units in the project that are currently for sale.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectDwellingUnitsForSaleCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of units in the project that are currently rented.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectDwellingUnitsRentedCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the total number of units in the project that have been sold.
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectDwellingUnitsSoldCount is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the project's building containing the subject property is complete.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectCompletedIndicator = "false") and SubjectBuildingCompletedIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the developer or the sponsor is in control of the management of the project.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true") and ProjectDeveloperOrSponsorControlsProjectManagementIndicator is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the incomplete project element(s).
Rule Logic: If ProjectCompletedIndicator = "false" and (at least one instance of PROJECT_COMPONENT is not provided or ProjectComponentCategoryType is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_COMPONENT)
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide a description when the incomplete project element = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectComponentCategoryType = "Other" and ProjectComponentCategoryTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_COMPONENT
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Deliver ProjectComponentCompletedIndicator as false for each incomplete project element. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ProjectCompletedIndicator = "false" and ProjectComponentCompletedIndicator is not = "false" in a given instance of PROJECT_COMPONENT

Message Text: Indicate whether the cooperative has project blanket financing.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Cooperative" or "Condop", and ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the number of 'Shares Issued and Outstanding'.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Cooperative" or "Condop", and ProjectTotalSharesIssuedAndOutstandingCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the greatest number of shares owned by a single entity in the cooperative project.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Cooperative" or "Condop", and SingleEntityGreatestNumberOfSharesCount is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide the greatest number of units owned by a single entity in the condominium project.
Rule Logic: If ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium" and SingleEntityGreatestNumberOfUnitsCount is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether a tax reduction or exemption has been granted to the subject property.
Rule Logic: If (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true") and PropertyTaxAbatementsOrExemptionsIndicator is not provided
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: The expiration date for the tax abatements or exemptions cannot be before the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If TaxAbatementsOrExemptionsExpirationDate < YYYY-MM of AppraisalReportEffectiveDate
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Indicate whether the given lien is a line of credit.
Rule Logic: If ProjectBlanketFinancingIndicator = "true" and LineOfCreditIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROJECT_BLANKET_FINANCING

Message Text: Provide the association special assessment status (i.e., existing, none, proposed).
Rule Logic: If AssociationChargeType = "AssociationSpecialAssessment" and AssociationSpecialAssessmentStatusType is not provided in the given instance of ASSOCIATION_CHARGE
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: Provide at least one data source when the subject property is located in a project or PUD. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP container must be included that links DATA_SOURCE to PROJECT. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" or PUDIndicator = "true"), and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_PROJECT" that links DATA_SOURCE to PROJECT

Message Text: Provide the project legal structure ( i.e., Condominium, Cooperative, Condop).
Rule Logic: If PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has obtained an efficiency rating.
Rule Logic: If EfficiencyRatingExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has obtained green, health or wellness certification.
Rule Logic: If GreenCertificationExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the property has any renewable energy components.
Rule Logic: If RenewableEnergyComponentExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the renewable energy component is subject to a financing arrangement.
Rule Logic: If RenewableEnergyComponentOwnershipType = "Owned" and RenewableEnergyComponentFinancedIndicator is not provided in a given instance of RENEWABLE_ENERGY_COMPONENT

Message Text: Provide a description when renewable energy component ownership type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If RenewableEnergyComponentOwnershipType = "Other" and RenewableEnergyComponentOwnershipTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of RENEWABLE_ENERGY_COMPONENT

Message Text: Provide the type of renewable energy component.
Rule Logic: If RenewableEnergyComponentExistsIndicator = "true" and (at least one instance of RENEWABLE_ENERGY_COMPONENT is not provided or RenewableEnergyComponentType is not provided in a given instance of RENEWABLE_ENERGY_COMPONENT)

Message Text: Provide a description when renewable energy component type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If RenewableEnergyComponentType = "Other" and RenewableEnergyComponentTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of RENEWABLE_ENERGY_COMPONENT

Message Text: At least one defect, damage, or deficiency must be provided when the appraisal 'Market Value Condition' is 'Subject to Repair'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyValuationConditionalConclusionType = "SubjectToRepair" and there are no instances of DEFECT_DETAIL with DefectItemRecommendedActionType = "Repair"

Message Text: Provide a description of the 'Market Boundary'.
Rule Logic: If MarketBoundariesDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide the lookback period for sales in the market area.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryLookbackMonthsCount is not provided

Message Text: Provide the number of active listings, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryCount is not provided for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: Provide the 'Highest List Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryHighestPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Highest List Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryHighestPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: Provide the 'Lowest List Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryLowestPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Lowest List Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryLowestPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: Provide the 'Median Days on Market' for the active listings.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryMedianDaysOnMarketCount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: Provide the 'Median List Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryMedianPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Median List Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryMedianPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: The market inventory type qualifier of 'ActiveListings' must be provided only once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is more than one instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: A market inventory type qualifier of 'ActiveListings' must be provided for active listings inventory. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "ActiveListings"

Message Text: Provide the number of pending sales, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryCount is not provided for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "PendingSales"

Message Text: A market inventory type qualifier of 'PendingSales' must be provided only once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is more than one instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "PendingSales"

Message Text: A market inventory type qualifier of 'PendingSales' must be provided for pending sales inventory. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "PendingSales"

Message Text: Provide the number of total sales within the look back period, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryCount is not provided for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: Provide the 'Highest Sale Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryHighestPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Highest Sale Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryHighestPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: Provide the 'Lowest Sale Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryLowestPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Lowest Sale Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryLowestPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: Provide the 'Median Sale Price'.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryMedianPriceAmount is not provided in the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales" and MarketInventoryCount > 0

Message Text: The 'Median Sale Price' must be greater than $0.
Rule Logic: If MarketInventoryMedianPriceAmount <= 0 for the instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: A market inventory type qualifier of 'TotalSales' must be provided only once. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is more than one instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: A market inventory type qualifier of 'TotalSales' must be provided for total sales inventory. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of MARKET_INVENTORY with MarketInventoryType = "TotalSales"

Message Text: Provide 'Demand/Supply'.
Rule Logic: If MarketSupplyTrendType is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether distressed market competition exists.
Rule Logic: If MarketTrendsForeclosureActivityIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide either an image of the price trend graph or price trend analysis commentary.
Rule Logic: If PriceTrendsAnalysisDescription is not provided, and ImageCategoryType = "PriceTrendGraph" is not provided in any instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide 'Price Trend Source' name for each data source used for the development of the price trend analysis.
Rule Logic: If DataSourceName is not provided in a given instance of DATA_SOURCE that captures the Price Trend Source

Message Text: Provide at least one data source that the Appraiser used to determine price trends for the subject property. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DATA_SOURCE to MARKET_TREND. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DATA_SOURCE_IsDataSourceFor_MARKET_TREND" linking DATA_SOURCE to MARKET_TREND where @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty"

Message Text: Indicate whether the highest and best use of the property is financially feasible.
Rule Logic: If FinanciallyFeasibleIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the highest and best use of the property is legally permissible.
Rule Logic: If LegallyPermissibleIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the highest and best use of the property is maximally productive.
Rule Logic: If MaximallyProductiveIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the highest and best use of the property is physically possible.
Rule Logic: If PhysicallyPossibleIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the present or the proposed use is the highest and best.
Rule Logic: If SiteHighestBestUseIndicator is not provided
Report Label / Value: Is the highest and best use of the subject property as improved (or as proposed per plans and specifications) the present use?

Message Text: Provide the area of the 'Carport' or 'Garage'.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "Carport" or "Garage", and CarStorageAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the attachment type for the 'Carport' or 'Garage'.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "Carport" or "Garage", and CarStorageAttachmentType is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: The type of vehicle storage must be included. Select 'None' if there is no vehicle storage.
Rule Logic: If at least one instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL is not provided or CarStorageType is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description when vehicle storage type = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "Other" and CarStorageTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the material used for the 'Driveway' or 'Shared Driveway'.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "Driveway" or "SharedDriveway", and ImprovedSurfaceMaterialType is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description when street surface material = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If ImprovedSurfaceMaterialType = "Other" and ImprovedSurfaceMaterialTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the number of parking spaces.
Rule Logic: If (CarStorageType = "Driveway" or "SharedDriveway", and TenOrMoreParkingSpacesIndicator = "false") or (CarStorageType = "Carport" or "CommonCarport" or "Garage" or "OpenLot" or "Other" or "ParkingGarage"), and ParkingSpacesCount is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether the 'Driveway' or 'Shared Driveway' has ten or more parking spaces.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "Driveway" or "SharedDriveway", and TenOrMoreParkingSpacesIndicator is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the parking space assignment for 'Common Carport', 'Open Lot', or 'Parking Garage'.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType = "CommonCarport" or "OpenLot" or "ParkingGarage", and ProjectParkingSpaceAssignmentType is not provided in a given instance of CAR_STORAGE_DETAIL

Message Text: Indicate whether any vehicle storage has defects.
Rule Logic: If CarStorageType <> "None" and VehicleStorageDefectsExistIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether a sketch or floor plan has been included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If SketchExistsIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Measurement Standard' (i.e., ANSI, AMS) used for the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If SketchExistsIndicator = "true" and MeasurementStandardPublisherType is not provided

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Measurement Standard' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If MeasurementStandardPublisherType = "Other" and MeasurementStandardPublisherTypeOtherDescription is not provided

Message Text: The type of functional issue must be included. Select 'None' if there are no functional issues.
Rule Logic: If at least one instance of FUNCTIONAL_ISSUE is not provided or FunctionalIssueType is not provided in a given instance of FUNCTIONAL_ISSUE

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Functional Issues' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If FunctionalIssueType = "Other" and FunctionalIssueTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of FUNCTIONAL_ISSUE

Message Text: The type of disaster mitigation feature must be included. Select 'None' if there are no disaster mitigation features.
Rule Logic: If at least one instance of DISASTER_MITIGATION_FEATURE is not provided or DisasterMitigationFeatureType is not provided in a given instance of DISASTER_MITIGATION_FEATURE

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Mitigation Feature' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If DisasterMitigationFeatureType = "Other" and DisasterMitigationFeatureTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of DISASTER_MITIGATION_FEATURE

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency with one or more amenities. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking each DEFECT to the AMENITY that has the defect. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and SubjectPropertyAmenitiesDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_AMENITY" linking DEFECT to the AMENITY

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency with one or more vehicle storages. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking each DEFECT to the CAR_STORAGE that has the defect. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and VehicleStorageDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_CAR_STORAGE" linking DEFECT to CAR_STORAGE

Message Text: Indicate whether any defects, damages, or deficiencies are observed on the exterior of the dwelling.
Rule Logic: If DwellingExteriorDefectsExistIndicator is not provided in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL where ImprovementType = "Dwelling"

Message Text: Indicate whether the living unit has any defects, damages, or deficiencies.
Rule Logic: If (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitInteriorDefectsExistIndicator is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency with the dwelling exterior. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DEFECT to IMPROVEMENT (ImprovementType = 'Dwelling'). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and DwellingExteriorDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_IMPROVEMENT" that links DEFECT to the given instance of IMPROVEMENT with ImprovementType = 'Dwelling'

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency with the site. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DEFECT to SITE. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and SiteDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_SITE" linking DEFECT to SITE

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency in the interior of the living unit or the ADU. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DEFECT to the PROPERTY_UNIT that has the defect. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and UnitInteriorDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_PROPERTY_UNIT" linking DEFECT to the given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: Provide at least one defect when the Appraiser identified a defect, damage or deficiency in the outbuilding. In the UAD XML, a minimum of one RELATIONSHIP must be included linking DEFECT to IMPROVEMENT (ImprovementType = 'Outbuilding'). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty" and OutbuildingDefectsExistIndicator = "true", and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP with @xlink:arcrole = "urn:fdc:mismo.org:2009:residential/DEFECT_ContainsDefectOf_IMPROVEMENT" linking DEFECT to IMPROVEMENT with ImprovementType = 'Outbuilding'

Message Text: The number of 'Accessory Dwelling Units' plus the number of 'Units Excluding ADUs' must equal the total number of living units across all buildings.
Rule Logic:
If AccessoryDwellingUnitTotalCount plus
LivingUnitExcludingADUCount does not equal the sum of LivingUnitCount across all instances of STRUCTURE_DETAIL

Message Text: Each dwelling must contain at least one living unit that is not an ADU.
Rule Logic: For each instance of IMPROVEMENT_DETAIL with ImprovementType = "Dwelling", if there is no occurrences of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL with AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "false"

Message Text: Provide 'Effective Age' either as a number of years or as a range of years, but not both.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and EffectiveAgeYearsCount is provided, and (either or both of EffectiveAgeRangeLowYearsCount or EffectiveAgeRangeHighYearsCount is provided) in a given instance of STRUCTURE_ANALYSIS_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide 'Effective Age' either as a number of years or as a range of years.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and EffectiveAgeYearsCount is not provided, and (either EffectiveAgeRangeLowYearsCount or EffectiveAgeRangeHighYearsCount is not provided) in a given instance of STRUCTURE_ANALYSIS_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide either the amount related to the transfer of ownership of real property (typically the sale price), or the reason why the ownership transfer amount was not available.
Rule Logic: If PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true" and ((OwnershipTransferTransactionAmount and OwnershipTransferAmountNotAvailableReasonType are not provided) or (OwnershipTransferTransactionAmount and OwnershipTransferAmountNotAvailableReasonType are provided))

Message Text: Provide the property 'Seller Name'.
Rule Logic: If neither FullName nor LastName is provided for PartyRoleType = "PropertySeller"

Message Text: Provide the name of the 'Current Owner of Public Record'.
Rule Logic: If neither FullName nor LastName is provided for PartyRoleType = "PropertyOwner"

Message Text: Provide 'Borrower Name'.
Rule Logic: If neither FullName nor LastName is provided for PartyRoleType = "Borrower"

Message Text: Only the most recent sale should be delivered. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "LandComparable" and there is more than one instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Only the most recent sale should be delivered. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "GrossRentMultiplierComparable" and there is more than one instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Only the most recent sale should be delivered. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "PropertyAnalyzedNotUsed" and there is more than one instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_DwellingFront.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the format of the image file. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If MIMETypeIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the format of the image file. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and MIMETypeIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Indicate whether the defect, damage, or deficiency affects the soundness and / or structural integrity of the improvement.
Rule Logic: If DefectItemAffectsSoundnessStructuralIntegrityIndicator is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description of the defect, damage or deficiency.
Rule Logic: If DefectItemDescription is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the location of the defect, damage or deficiency.
Rule Logic: If DefectItemLocationType is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide a description when the location of the defect, damage or deficiency = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If DefectItemLocationType = "Other" and DefectItemLocationTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the recommended action for the identified defect, damage or deficiency.
Rule Logic: If DefectItemRecommendedActionType is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the feature where the defect, damage or deficiency has been observed.
Rule Logic: If DefectComponentLabelType is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL that is not associated with AMENTIY or CAR_STORAGE

Message Text: Provide a description when label of the defect, damage or deficiency = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If DefectComponentLabelType = "Other" and DefectComponentLabelTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of DEFECT_DETAIL

Message Text: One or more duplicate RELATIONSHIP containers exist. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If the 'xlink:arcrole', 'xlink:from', and 'xlink:to' labels are not unique across all instances of RELATIONSHIP

Message Text: The 'from' label included in a RELATIONSHIP container is missing from the associated container. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If the associated container does not have the xlink:from label specified in a given instance of RELATIONSHIP

Message Text: The 'to' label included in a RELATIONSHIP container is missing from the associated container or data element. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If the associated container or data element does not have the xlink:to label specified in a given instance of RELATIONSHIP

Message Text: Provide depreciation amount as summary, represented by 'Total Depreciation' or all three forms of depreciation ('Physical Depreciation', 'Functional Depreciation' and 'External Depreciation'), even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and DepreciationTotalAmount is not provided, and (DepreciationExternalAmount or DepreciationFunctionalAmount or DepreciationPhysicalAmount are not provided) in a given instance of IMPROVEMENT_COST_AND_DEPRECIATED_VALUE/IMPROVEMENT_DEPRECIATION

Message Text: The 'Date of Manufacture' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If ManufacturedHomeManufactureDate does not include year, month and day in YYYY-MM-DD format

Message Text: More than one Appraiser has been identified in the appraisal. There can be only one Appraiser, the other has to be Supervisory Appraiser.
Rule Logic: If more than one instance of ROLE_DETAIL has PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" across all instances of PARTY

Message Text: The 'Inspection Date' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If InspectionDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Message Text: The listing 'Start Date' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If ListingStartDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Message Text: The listing 'End Date' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If ListingEndDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Message Text: The expiration date for the tax abatements or exemptions must include year and month (YYYY-MM format).
Rule Logic: If TaxAbatementsOrExemptionsExpirationDate does not include year and month (YYYY-MM format)
Report Subsection: Project Factors and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: The 'Contract Date' must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If SalesContractDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format)

Message Text: There is an indicator of a living unit in an outbuilding, and it was not identified as an ADU. Any living unit in an outbuilding is considered an ADU, or it would have to be identified as a dwelling.
Rule Logic: If AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "false" for a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL in IMPROVEMENT with ImprovementType = "Outbuilding"

Message Text: Provide the date the sales contract was fully executed.
Rule Logic: IF @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" AND ContractDateUnknownIndicator = "false", and SalesContractDate is not provided

Message Text: At least one defect, damage, or deficiency must be provided when the appraisal 'Market Value Condition' is 'Subject to Inspection'.
Rule Logic: If PropertyValuationConditionalConclusionType = "SubjectToInspection" and there are no instances of DEFECT_DETAIL with DefectItemRecommendedActionType = "Inspection"

Message Text: Provide 'Reasonable Exposure Time' as a number of days or as a range of days, but not both.
Rule Logic: If MarketingOrExposureDaysCount is provided, and (either or both of MarketingOrExposureLowRangeDaysCount or MarketingOrExposureHighRangeDaysCount is provided)

Message Text: Provide the ownership transfer transaction type (i.e., sale, deed transfer only).
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator = "true", and (at least one instance of SALES_HISTORY is not provided or OwnershipTransferTransactionType is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY)

Message Text: Provide the ownership transfer date.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and OwnershipTransferDate is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY
Report Section: Sales Comparison Approach; Prior Sale and Transfer History

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_Garage.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_Flooring.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_Bedroom1.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_Deck.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: Provide the file name and location of the image within the .zip file (e.g., \\Images\MH1_ExteriorTrimDDD.png). For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If ImageFileLocationIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of IMAGE

Message Text: The cooperative proprietary lease expiration date must include year and month (YYYY-MM format).
Rule Logic: If CooperativeProprietaryLeaseExpirationDate is not provided in YYYY-MM format.

Message Text: The latitude must be a value between -90 and 90 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If LatitudeIdentifier is not provided between -90 and 90 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point

Message Text: The longitude must be a value between -180 and 180 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If LongitudeIdentifier is not provided between -180 and 180 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point

Message Text: The prior sale or transfer date for the sales comparable must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If OwnershipTransferDate does not include year, month and day (YYYY-MM-DD format) in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY
Report Section: Sales Comparison Approach; Prior Sale and Transfer History

Message Text: The amount related to the transfer of ownership of real property (typically the sale price) must be greater than or equal to $0.
Rule Logic: If OwnershipTransferTransactionAmount < 0 in SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide 'Reasonable Exposure Time' as a number of days or as a range of days.
Rule Logic: If MarketingOrExposureDaysCount is not provided, and (either MarketingOrExposureLowRangeDaysCount or MarketingOrExposureHighRangeDaysCount is not provided)

Message Text: The exterior inspection method, interior inspection method, and inspection date must be associated with the party that performed the inspection. In the UAD XML, one instance of RELATIONSHIP must be included for each Appraiser and/or Supervisory Appraiser that links INSPECTION to ROLE. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If PartyRoleType = "Appraiser" or "AppraiserSupervisor" and there is no instance of RELATIONSHIP provided for each role that links INSPECTION to the associated ROLE.

Message Text: The latitude must be a value between -90 and 90 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and LatitudeIdentifier is not provided between -90 and 90 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point

Message Text: The longitude must be a value between -180 and 180 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point. For assistance with this message, contact the appraisal software vendor.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and LongitudeIdentifier is not provided between -180 and 180 with at least 5 digits of precision to the right of the decimal point

Message Text: Indicate whether a reconsideration of value has been requested.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueIndicator is not provided

Message Text: Provide the commentary on the outcome of the reconsideration of value.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueIndicator = "true" and ReconsiderationOfValueCommentDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide the party that initiated the request for reconsideration of value.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueIndicator = "true" and ReconsiderationOfValueRequestedByType is not provided

Message Text: Indicate whether the reconsideration of value request resulted in a change to the Opinion of Market Value.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueIndicator = "true" and ReconsiderationOfValueResultType is not provided

Message Text: Provide the date the appraiser completed the reconsideration of value.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueIndicator = "true" and ReconsiderationOfValueResultDate is not provided

Message Text: The reconsideration of value date must include year, month and day.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueResultDate does not include year, month and day YYYY-MM-DD format

Message Text: The reconsideration of value date must be on or after the 'Effective Date of Appraisal'.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueResultDate < AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

Message Text: The reconsideration of value date cannot be more than a year old.
Rule Logic: If ReconsiderationOfValueResultDate is more than 367 days before the current date

Message Text: Only one line-item adjustment is allowed for this Adjustment Type.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and there is more than one instance of COMPARABLE_ADJUSTMENT with the same ComparableAdjustmentType enumeration that should only be adjusted once (e.g., View). Please refer to the Adjustments Cardinality tab for the list of adjustments that can be applied only once.

Message Text: More than one Supervisory Appraiser has been identified in the appraisal. There can be only one Supervisory Appraiser.
Rule Logic: If more than one instance of ROLE_DETAIL has PartyRoleType = "AppraiserSupervisor" across all instances of PARTY

Message Text: Provide 'Reconciliation of Sales Comparison Approach' when sales comparison approach is included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If SalesComparisonApproachIndicator = "true" and SalesComparisonCommentDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Cost Approach Commentary' when cost approach is included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If CostApproachIndicator = "true" and CostAnalysisCommentDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Income Approach Commentary' when income approach is included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If IncomeApproachIndicator = "true" and IncomeAnalysisCommentDescription is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Rental Analysis Commentary' when rent schedule is included in the appraisal.
Rule Logic: If RentScheduleIndicator = "true" and there is no instance of VALUATION_COMMENTARY with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "ComparableRental" and ValuationCommentText

Message Text: Each dwelling must contain at least one living unit.
Rule Logic: If ImprovementType = ‘Dwelling’ and there are no instances of PROPERTY_UNIT

Message Text: The commentary provided for the specified field exceeds the allowable limit of 140 characters.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = ("HazardZones" or "PropertyNonResidentialUses") and ValuationCommentText length exceeds 140 characters
Report Subsection: Site Features and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: The commentary provided for the specified field exceeds the allowable limit of 210 characters.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = ("ProjectDeveloperOrSponsorControlsProjectManagement" or "IncompleteProject" or "ProjectConversion" or "SingleEntityGreatestNumberOfUnitsOwned" or "SingleEntityGreatestNumberOfSharesOwned" or "ProjectCommercialSpace" or "ProjectLegalAction" or "ProjectSpecialAssessmentsAttributedToSubjectProperty" or "TransferFeeAttributedToSubjectProperty" or "PropertyTaxAbatementsOrExemptions") and ValuationCommentText length exceeds 210 characters

Message Text: The commentary provided for the specified field exceeds the allowable limit of 540 characters.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = "PropertySpecialTaxAssessments" and ValuationCommentText length exceeds 540 characters
Report Label / Value: Description of Special Tax Assessments and Impact to Value / Marketability

Message Text: The commentary provided for the specified field exceeds the allowable limit of 2500 characters.
Rule Logic: If ValuationAnalysisCategoryType = ("ProjectFactors" or "Project" or "WaterFrontages" or "SiteFeatures" or "SiteViews" or "SiteInfluences") and ValuationCommentText length exceeds 2500 characters

Message Text: Provide 'Site Influence (Location)' for the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and (at least one instance of SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL is not provided or SiteInfluenceType is not provided in a given instance of SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL)

Message Text: Provide a description when 'Site Influence (Location)' = 'Other'.
Rule Logic: If SiteInfluenceType = "Other" and SiteInfluenceTypeOtherDescription is not provided in a given instance of SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide the 'Transfer Terms' for the associated transaction.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and OwnershipTransferTransactionType = "Sale" and SaleType is not provided in a given instance of SALES_HISTORY

Message Text: Provide 'Floor Number' for the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and  ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = ("Lowrise" or "Highrise" or "Midrise"), and FloorIdentifier is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL

Message Text: Provide 'Property Rights Appraised' for the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "false" or (PropertyInProjectIndicator = "true" and ProjectLegalStructureType = "Condominium")), and PropertyEstateType is not provided

Message Text: Provide 'Construction Method' (e.g., Site Built, Manufactured, Modular) for each dwelling of the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Detached") or (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and AttachmentType = "Attached" and StructuralDesignType = "RowhouseTownhouse" or "SemiDetached" or "Other")), and (at least one instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD is not provided or ConstructionMethodType is not provided in a given instance of CONSTRUCTION_METHOD)

Message Text: Provide the 'Manufactured Home Width' (i.e., Single Wide, Multi Wide) for the sales comparable.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and ConstructionMethodType = "Manufactured" and ManufacturedHomeWidthType is not provided

Message Text: Provide the 'Unfinished Area Below Grade' for the sales comparable, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic: If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and (ImprovementType = "Dwelling" or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true")), and UnitBelowGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Finished Area Below Grade (Nonstandard)' for the sales comparable, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic:
If @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and UnitNonStandardBelowGradeFinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty") 
or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and UnitNonStandardBelowGradeFinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty")), and UnitNonStandardBelowGradeFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Unfinished Area Above Grade' for the sales comparable, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic:
IF @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and UnitAboveGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty") 
or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and UnitAboveGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty")), and UnitAboveGradeUnfinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA

Message Text: Provide the 'Finished Area Above Grade (Nonstandard)' for the sales comparable, even if the value is 0.
Rule Logic:
IF @ValuationUseType = "SalesComparable" and ((ImprovementType = "Dwelling" and UnitNonStandardAboveGradeFinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty") 
or (ImprovementType = "Outbuilding" and OutbuildingRealPropertyIndicator = "true" and AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = "true" and UnitNonStandardAboveGradeFinishedAreaMeasure > 0 for @ValuationUseType = "SubjectProperty")), and UnitNonStandardAboveGradeFinishedAreaMeasure is not provided in a given instance of PROPERTY_UNIT_AREA
